title: uncarina dimidiata
intro: Uncarina dimidiata, also known as the "Bokhoboko", is a plant species native to the island of Madagascar and belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. Uncarina dimidiata has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Uncarina dimidiata include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
